_note: SELF-HOST repurposing of the RE-RANK 08 schema (D21): each entry = one remaining PROMPT-BUILD/CR, not a product slice. done_sentinel = the disk path whose presence+validity+class-discriminator == that build shipped (orchestrator STEP-0 derived-state key; D14/D20 analog). roadmap_version 6 = operator-directed ledger refresh (2026-06-11) after W6-REAUTHOR-REST 03-hld + 02-adr phases shipped + committed (6171502). roadmap_version 7 = operator-directed actual-state sync (2026-06-11): per-phase progress within W6-REAUTHOR-REST reflected (01-roadmap done + clean-room-verified; 00-aprd CLASSIFIER shipped 1/9) + drift-class lesson (incl. field-NAME variant) + 04-build spot-check TODO integrated into this ledger from now-deleted ephemeral memory (disk = source of truth, D20). Refresh moves all shipped CR-002 entries (W0, W1-W5, W6-REAUTHOR-04BUILD, W1b) into completed[]; remaining_sequence now = the genuinely-unshipped builds only. SCOPED to the CR-002 deterministic-spine wave + the CR-003 registry-fidelity fix; prior delivered waves (greenfield 10, bugfix 8) live on disk (D20), not re-listed. Disk is source of truth — this ledger is informational ordering, not the truth the loop derives from. DERIVED FRONTIER = W6-REAUTHOR-REST (in progress): sentinel prompts/00-aprd/SYNTHESIZE.md still pre-CR -> wave not done; per-phase disk scan shows 03-hld + 02-adr re-authored (done), so the NEXT phase = 01-roadmap, then 00-aprd. W1b-REGISTRY-ENRICH shipped (schemas.lock v2: description on every property, element shapes tightened). The example-loss drift class surfaced during 03-hld (a dropped inline-schema EXAMPLE carried derivation value W1b's descriptions did not; relocate to prompt prose, never re-add a schema) is now applied proactively per phase. DRIFT CLASS (durable, integrated from ephemeral notes): dropping an inline `## Output schema` can lose either a derivation-value EXAMPLE or the SOLE prose-home of output field NAMES; both pass registry validation yet drift clean-room value-parity vs golden. Fix = relocate the cue (which-fields + derivation logic) into Task-steps prose; never re-add a schema, never assume registry descriptions substitute. Field-NAME variant verified on 00-aprd CLASSIFIER (runner invented SR-001/verbatim/wrong escape shape until prose named the keys + id format). OUTSTANDING: W6-REAUTHOR-04BUILD spot-check for the same drift (it shipped before the class was understood).

remaining_sequence.name: re-author 03/02/01/00 prompts, per phase
remaining_sequence.rationale: Per-phase, same bar: no inputs:/schema block, outputs[].schema id, clean-room value-parity vs _fixtures/greenfield-clean (both directions). One self-slice pass per phase; relocate any derivation-value cue AND any output field-name the prose did not already carry from the dropped inline schema into Task-steps prose (example-loss drift class incl. field-NAME variant — see top _note). PROGRESS (2026-06-11): 03-hld SHIPPED (8 roles; 2 drift fixes — DERIVE-COMPONENTS persistence-store cue, MODEL-FLOWS flow_counts cue), 02-adr SHIPPED (7 roles; 5 exact-parity + 2 judgment-variance DECISION-EXTRACT/TRIAGE proven not-drift via byte-identical logic diff), 01-roadmap SHIPPED (7 roles; clean-room-verified before its manual commit 72ac035 — operator-confirmed, NOT a latent-drift carrier), 00-aprd IN PROGRESS (CLASSIFIER shipped 1/9; field-name drift caught + fixed in 1 re-author). Derived NEXT = remaining 8 00-aprd roles (CRITIQUE, EXTRACT, EXTRACT-RULES, GAP-DETECT, QUESTION-GEN, RECONCILE, SYNTHESIZE, VERIFY). Wave done when the 00-aprd SYNTHESIZE sentinel is re-authored. Economy-audit residue + LOW findings (RECONCILE-CRITIQUE target:none sentinel, RESOLVE-LOCAL brownfield escalations shape) deferred to W9.

remaining_sequence.name: orchestrator STEP-4.1 swap: resolve+prefill+compute
remaining_sequence.rationale: Discriminator: STEP-4.1 calls resolve(role,state) + prefill + compute + validate around the LLM fill (replaces parse-frontmatter). Gate = full self-host loop drains _fixtures/ clean e2e (regression-guard). Lands LAST among consumers (code + prompts proven first).

remaining_sequence.name: reconcile ALL accumulated lint + ECONOMY-AUDIT findings across the re-authored corpus
remaining_sequence.unit: prompts/**/*.md lint-clean + ECONOMY-AUDIT-clean (both-directions) + prompts/_economy-audit.md Rule-2 / lint-profile calibration where a finding is a dual-mode false-positive
remaining_sequence.rationale: Terminal sweep. Every prompt's lint + ECONOMY-AUDIT residue deferred per-wave during W6/W7 (defer-not-chase, avoids over-stripping the standalone-PART-A/B dual-mode design) is resolved to EXACTLY ONE of: (a) prompt DELETE/REWRITE — genuine AB1/AB7 debt; (b) prompts/_economy-audit.md Rule-2 calibration — a dual-mode standalone-Part restatement is sanctioned, NOT a duplicate (the auditor mis-fires, fix the auditor not the prompt, routes_to:canon); (c) lint-profile threshold note in the stack profile. Confirmed mis-fire seen in 03-hld: MODEL-DATA Register-block 'starvation' is a false positive (short Register is corpus convention). done_sentinel .roadmap/09-economy-reconcile.json records per-prompt lint verdict:clean + economy-audit verdict:clean across the whole corpus + a both-directions proof (planted-bloat copy still BLOCKED). Discriminator: zero prompt carries an unresolved blocking lint/audit finding AND the report's both-directions proof holds. NEVER ADD an instruction to silence a finding (AB9 keystone).

remaining_sequence.name: pack gate: wire all selftests, re-skin, ship
remaining_sequence.rationale: Compound: pack.mjs runs all selftests (validator + resolver + graph-lint + det modules + emitters + economy-lint) green; dist/adp-v<ver>.tgz ships. Lands AFTER W9 so the corpus is economy-clean in the tarball. No tarball if any selftest mis-proves. Validator selftest now includes W1b's tightened both-directions proof.
